prompt:
ܦܪܩܐ ܐ

1:1 ܟܬܘܒ ܚܡܫ ܡ̈ܠܠܐ ܥܠ ܟ̈ܠܒܐ ܀ ܘܟܠ ܡܠܬܐ ܡܢ ܡ̈ܠܠܐ ܗܠܝܢ ܬܫܬܠܡ ܒܡܠܬܐ ܕܝܘܡܢܐ ܀
(Write five sentences concerning dogs. And every sentence from these sentences shall be completed with the word "today".)

1:2 ܘܟܠ ܚܕܐ ܡܢ ܚܡܫ ܡ̈ܠܠܐ ܗܠܝܢ ܒܫܘܠܡܗ̇ ܢܗܘܐ ܣܝܡ ܡܠܬܐ ܕܝܘܡܢܐ ܀
(And each one of these five sentences, at its ending, there shall be placed the word "today".)

1:3 ܘܡܠܬܐ ܐܚܪܝܬܐ ܕܟܠ ܚܕܐ ܡܢ ܡ̈ܠܠܐ ܗܠܝܢ ܬܗܘܐ ܡܠܬܐ ܕܝܘܡܢܐ ܘܠܐ ܡܠܬܐ ܐܚܪܬܐ ܀
(And the last word of each one of these sentences shall be the word "today" and not another word.)
response:
Dogs are friendly animals today.  
Many dogs like to run and play today.  
A dog can be a loyal companion today.  
Some dogs bark when they hear strangers today.  
People care for dogs with food and love today.
